content: Create backup files to protect your data. Backups can be created manually or automatically.

comment.text: This text describes the purpose of data backups, explaining that they protect data and can be created manually or automatically. It appears as a description within a backup service toggle section in the Portal Settings. Translators should convey the importance of data protection.

usage.context:
<div className={styles.container}>
 <ServiceToggleSection
 isEnabled={isBackupServiceOn!}
 onToggle={handleToggleChange}
 title={t("Common:Backup")}
 description={t("Payments:BackupDescription")}
 isDisabled={isLoading}
 />
 <WalletInfo
 shortView
 withoutBackground
